reviews.comment:
Feriado largo, dejaron solo a un playero. No abre el área serviclub. Los baños son inusables.

(Translated by Google)
Long weekend, they left only one beach attendant. The service area is closed. The restrooms are unusable.

reviews.comment:
Siempre uso las instalaciones del ACA, porque soy socio, su atención es muy buena y las instalaciones siempre higienicas, es lo mejor.

(Translated by Google)
I always use the ACA facilities because I'm a member. Their service is excellent, and the facilities are always clean. It's the best.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXa2NpUm5nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente ubicación y atención. No es solo una estación de servicio, además es un sitio donde puedes descansar del viaje, comer algo, proveerte de agua para el mate, caminar por el parque y disfrutar de un momento agradable junto a tu familia

(Translated by Google)
Excellent location and service. It's not just a gas station; it's also a place where you can rest after your trip, grab a bite to eat, get hot water for your mate, stroll through the park, and enjoy some quality time with your family.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHaWZYd0J3EAE

reviews.comment:
22hs, pleno fin de semana largo de temporada y está cerrado el servicompras. Y cuando está abierto es muy limitado. Para ser un ACA deja bastante que desear.

(Translated by Google)
It's 10 PM, the middle of a long weekend, and the convenience store is closed. And when it is open, it has very limited services. For an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina), it leaves much to be desired.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNGVtV3RBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atienden muy bien y rápido

(Translated by Google)
They provide excellent and fast service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXd2QyVjNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los baños son tan sucios que no se puede creer, falta de limpieza en toda la estacion,en un estado de abandono y despreocupacion increíble

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are unbelievably dirty; the entire station lacks cleanliness and is in an incredible state of neglect and disrepair.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXd2JMb1dnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy limpio, los baños excelentes, varios asi que no tenes que esperar mucho si vas con un contingente, agua para el mate gratis, y si te quedas un rato a estirar las piernas, tiene alrededor mucho verde

(Translated by Google)
Very clean, excellent bathrooms, several so you don't have to wait long if you're with a group, free hot water for mate, and if you stay a while to stretch your legs, there's plenty of greenery around.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXZ2F2T05REAE
